title: Co-Editor, Education Department
notes: Built editorial networks and reviewed and edited submissions for publication. Worked with co-editor to strategically plan the direction of the Education Department.

title: Chair
notes: Coordinated and organized all aspects of the virtual chapter focused on education in computation.

title: Assistant Chair
notes: Supported leadership and organization of chapter activities related to computational education.

title: MSU Hub Fellow
notes: Worked with the Jupyter Core Development Team to improve accessibility of Jupyter Notebook and JupyterLab. Coordinated with MSU Central IT on development of a campus-wide JupyterHub. Researched use of Jupyter as an interface to compiled languages (C, C++, Fortran, CUDA) and evaluated effectiveness of Jupyter in online vs. in-person learning.

title: STEM Gateway Fellow
notes: Collaborated with learning leaders across the College of Natural Science to integrate introductory STEM curricula. Developed and evaluated undergraduate instructional materials using three-dimensional learning approaches.

title: Campus Champion
notes: Served as Campus Champion supporting national cyberinfrastructure initiatives. Roles included Campus Champion Fellow (2012–2013), leadership team member (2012–2014), support staff (2012–2014), chair of Birds of a Feather programs (XSEDE 2014), co-organizer of training and Small Centers sessions (TeraGrid 2011, XSEDE 2013), and invited panelist (TeraGrid 2011; XSEDE 2012).
